Design a world-class AI-powered educational intelligence platform called “ConceptIntel”. The platform is a futuristic adaptive learning ecosystem for university students, teachers, course coordinators, and admins. The UI must feel like a premium AI startup product instead of a traditional LMS or student project.

The platform workflow should feel connected like a real educational story:

* Course coordinators create and supervise curriculum structures
* Teachers create courses and upload learning materials
* The system extracts concepts using AI
* Knowledge graphs are automatically generated
* Students join courses using enrollment codes or invitation links
* Students study through adaptive AI-powered learning paths
* Students attempt quizzes and assignments
* AI evaluates learning gaps and mastery
* Teachers monitor student progress and approve AI-generated content
* Course coordinators monitor curriculum consistency and concept alignment
* Admins oversee the entire platform ecosystem

The UI should visually communicate:

* intelligence
* adaptive learning
* interconnected knowledge
* calm productivity
* futuristic education
* graph-based learning systems

GLOBAL DESIGN STYLE:

Create both DARK MODE and LIGHT MODE versions.

DARK MODE:
Background: #0B1020
Cards: #121A2F
Primary Accent: #6C63FF
Secondary Accent: #4FD1C5

LIGHT MODE:
Background: #F5F7FB
Cards: #FFFFFF
Primary Accent: #5B5CEB
Secondary Accent: #14B8A6

Additional colors:
Success: #22C55E
Warning: #F59E0B
Weak Concepts/Error: #EF4444

Style:

* futuristic academic minimalism
* premium SaaS dashboards
* subtle glassmorphism
* glowing graph visuals
* spacious layouts
* elegant typography
* smooth shadows
* rounded 20px cards
* modern charts
* mastery rings
* adaptive learning visuals
* AI assistant orb
* intelligent sidebars
* subtle animations
* soft hover effects
* graph pulse animations
* smooth transitions

Typography:

* Inter font family
* Bold clean headings
* Spacious readable text hierarchy

The platform should psychologically reduce student stress and improve focus through calming layouts and clean hierarchy.

Avoid:

* childish visuals
* cluttered dashboards
* excessive gradients
* random colors
* gaming overload

ROLE-BASED EXPERIENCE:

STUDENT:

* calming
* motivational
* personalized
* adaptive
* progress-driven

TEACHER:

* productive
* analytical
* organized
* academic

COURSE COORDINATOR:

* intelligent
* strategic
* curriculum-focused
* governance-oriented

ADMIN:

* enterprise
* monitoring
* system management

DESIGN THE FOLLOWING CONNECTED PLATFORM FLOW:

1. LANDING PAGE
   A premium futuristic AI startup landing page introducing ConceptIntel. Include:

* Hero section
* AI-powered learning visuals
* Animated knowledge graph
* Feature sections
* Adaptive learning showcase
* Analytics showcase
* Gamification showcase
* Testimonials
* Statistics
* CTA buttons
* Light and dark mode toggle

2. AUTHENTICATION FLOW
   Design:

* Login page
* Signup page
* Role selection
* Password reset
* Modern authentication cards
* Social login options
* Futuristic educational aesthetics

3. COURSE CREATION PAGE
   Teacher creates a course.

Include:

* Course title
* Subject
* Semester
* Prerequisites
* Course thumbnail
* Course visibility
* Enrollment code generation
* Invitation link generation
* Schedule setup
* CLO/PLO fields
* Course roadmap preview
* AI-assisted course setup
* Draft/Open/Closed status
* Elegant multi-step creation flow

4. CONTENT UPLOAD PAGE
   Teacher uploads:

* PDFs
* slides
* textbooks
* outlines
* reference books

Include:

* Drag-and-drop upload
* Upload progress
* AI extraction animation
* File preview
* Concept extraction preview
* Validation indicators
* Smart AI processing visuals
* Generated concept suggestions

5. KNOWLEDGE GRAPH GENERATION PAGE
   The system converts uploaded content into intelligent concept graphs.

Include:

* Large glowing graph visualization
* Concept nodes
* Prerequisite pathways
* Editable relationships
* Concept clustering
* AI-generated suggestions
* Node mastery preview
* Zoom and filters
* Neo4j-inspired visualization
* Futuristic graph animations

6. COURSE ENROLLMENT PAGE
   Students join courses using:

* enrollment code
* invitation link

Include:

* Join course form
* Active course previews
* Prerequisite validation
* Success animations
* Course recommendation cards
* Modern onboarding experience

7. STUDENT DASHBOARD
   Main adaptive learning hub.

Include:

* Welcome section
* AI assistant greeting
* Active courses
* Continue learning
* Mastery overview
* Weak concepts
* XP and streaks
* Gamification widgets
* Personalized recommendations
* Upcoming assignments
* Notifications
* Analytics charts
* Knowledge graph preview
* Progress rings

8. COURSE LEARNING HUB
   Main student workspace.

Include:

* Course roadmap
* Topics
* Flashcards
* Quizzes
* Study guides
* Assignments
* AI recommendations
* Progress tracking
* Resource viewer
* Concept mastery
* Adaptive next-step suggestions

9. ADAPTIVE LEARNING PAGE
   AI-generated personalized learning roadmap.

Include:

* Learning journey timeline
* Revision plans
* Weak concept reinforcement
* Daily missions
* AI recommendations
* Smart scheduling
* Milestones
* Motivation system
* Progress tracking

10. ASSIGNMENT SUBMISSION + FEEDBACK PAGE
    Student submits assignments and receives explainable AI feedback.

Include:

* PDF upload
* Submission status
* AI feedback highlights
* Mistake annotations
* Concept-level weakness analysis
* Improvement recommendations
* Teacher comments
* Similarity detection
* Strength analysis
* Elegant review layout

11. TEACHER DASHBOARD
    Teacher monitors students and courses.

Include:

* Course analytics
* Student performance
* Weak concept heatmaps
* Pending reviews
* Engagement metrics
* Notifications
* Assignment approvals
* AI insights
* Quick course management
* Productivity-focused layout

12. ASSIGNMENT EVALUATION PAGE
    Teacher reviews student submissions.

Include:

* Submission table
* PDF preview
* AI evaluation
* Plagiarism indicators
* Annotation tools
* Approval workflow
* Grading system
* Concept analytics
* Feedback generation

13. CURRICULUM INTELLIGENCE DASHBOARD
    Course coordinator oversees curriculum consistency.

Include:

* Curriculum coverage
* Shared knowledge graph
* Teacher alignment
* Concept dependency analysis
* Curriculum gaps
* Cross-course prerequisite mapping
* Governance analytics
* Educational intelligence reports

14. KNOWLEDGE GRAPH SUPERVISION PAGE
    Course coordinator edits and validates curriculum graph.

Include:

* Drag-and-drop graph editing
* Relationship validation
* Teacher collaboration
* Graph version comparison
* Approval workflows
* AI recommendations
* Curriculum consistency indicators

15. ADMIN DASHBOARD
    Admin controls platform ecosystem.

Include:

* User management
* System analytics
* Course monitoring
* Platform statistics
* Role management
* Reports
* Notifications
* Enterprise dashboard feel

16. GAMIFICATION PAGE
    Modern mature gamification system.

Include:

* XP progression
* Achievement badges
* Streak tracking
* Challenges
* Missions
* Leaderboards
* Concept mastery rewards
* Motivational visuals

FINAL EXPERIENCE GOAL:

The final product should feel:

* futuristic
* intelligent
* adaptive
* calming
* graph-driven
* AI-powered
* startup-level
* modern
* premium
* educational
* visually unforgettable

The platform should look comparable to elite modern SaaS AI products, intelligent productivity systems, and advanced adaptive learning platforms rather than a traditional LMS.
